questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The fertile delta region of the Ganga-Brahmaputra river system is a major rice-producing area of India.
questions.reason: Reason (R): This region has an abundance of silt deposits which make the soil fertile and suitable for high-yielding varieties of rice.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: The fertile delta region is suitable for high-yielding varieties of rice due to its abundance of silt deposits and fertile soil.
